description: Add task status tracking and filtering to task list.

userStories.title: Add task status persistence with pending default
userStories.description: As a product team, I want each task to store a status value so that task state persists and existing records default to pending.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `status` field to task storage with allowed values `pending`, `in_progress`, and `done`
Existing tasks are backfilled to `pending` and new tasks default to `pending`

userStories.title: Implement backend task status update action
userStories.description: As a user, I want status changes saved so that task progress updates persist.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide backend action or endpoint to update task status by task id
Reject unsupported status values with validation errors
Persist status changes and return updated task payload

userStories.title: Show task status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want each task card to show a status badge so that I can scan progress quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards render status badge for pending, in_progress, and done
Badge text is distinct for each status
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add task-row status control
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change a task status from task list rows so that updates are fast.
acceptanceCriteria: Task rows include status selector with pending, in_progress, and done options
Changing selector triggers backend status update and refreshes row state
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter task list by status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so that I can focus on pending, in-progress, or done work.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list has filter options All, Pending, In Progress, and Done
Selected filter limits visible tasks to matching status
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
